who: clinic administrators in medical clinics processing 5–15 orders/month
offer: For clinic administrators in medical clinics processing 5–15 orders/month, inefficient tracking causes stockouts. We automate replenishment orders instead of manual inventory tracking and ordering.
problem: Inefficient tracking of medical supply inventory leading to stockouts.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for clinic administrators
Indie Hackers discussions on inventory management
DM outreach to clinic administrators with demo video
Community forums for sharing medical supply tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of inventory levels for 3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant forums
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing inventory data
Enable one-click export of basic reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
